summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Food Service Ordering System - all backend APIs pass (20/20 tests), frontend customer and admin flows working correctly

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - hydration error warning due to dev mode wrapper elements

action_items: Consider adding /admin redirect to /admin/login or /admin/dashboard for better UX
Investigate React hydration warnings in MenuManager.jsx (span inside option/select elements)
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns.
API routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Auth properly implemented with JWT tokens and admin-only endpoints protected
seed_data_creation: Created test menu item 'Test Pizza Margherita' at €12.99 for testing ordering flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food ordering system fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_food_ordering.py cover: Auth (login), Menu CRUD (get all, get single, create, update, delete, availability toggle), Orders (create, get by ID, get by apartment, status flow: pending→accepted→preparing→on_the_way→delivered, delete). Frontend pages: /food-service (customer menu & ordering), /admin/login, /admin/menu, /admin/orders. All working correctly.

customer_side: Checkout modal with customer name and apartment number ✓
admin_side: Accept order with time estimate (15/20/30 min) ✓
Menu CRUD: create, edit, delete items ✓
